/Users/jiajia/claudecode/ai-practice-vot.serviceRawFile:
service: ai-practice-voting

provider:
  name: tencent
  runtime: Nodejs18.15
  region: ap-guangzhou
  credentials: ~/.tencent_cloud_credentials/tencent_cloud_credentials

functions:
  app:
    handler: server/tencent.mainHandler
    memorySize: 128
    timeout: 10
    src: ./
    events:
      - apigw:
          parameters:
            protocols:
              - http
              - https
            serviceName: ai-practice-voting-api
            environment: release
            endpoints:
              - path: /
                method: ANY
              - path: /api/data
                method: ANY
              - path: /assets/*
                method: GET

package:
  patterns:
    - '!node_modules/.cache/**'
    - '!*.log'
    - '!dist-ssr/**'
